description: Registry of provisional secondary-error grouping derived from mechanisms tags priority hierarchy.

priority_hierarchy: 3. MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_FLOW: Matches control_flow_failure or semantic_goal_drift (or fallback)
grouping_rules.overlap_handling: Cells matching multiple sets of tags are assigned to the highest priority family. All matched tags are tracked in the matched_tags roster column.

MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_ALGO.description: Provisional secondary-error grouping: assertion-masked algorithmic logic or edge case omissions.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_ALGO.mechanism_hypothesis: Model-injected top-level assertions fail during module import, masking underlying algorithmic logic or edge case omissions in the core functions.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_ALGO.existing_supporting_evidence: All member cells contain 'module_level_executable_assertion' and 'algorithmic_error' or 'edge_case_omission'.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_ALGO.unresolved_ambiguities: Exact semantic correction requires context-dependent code transformations that are not uniquely defined.

MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_MATH.description: Provisional secondary-error grouping: assertion-masked mathematical errors or formula swaps.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_MATH.mechanism_hypothesis: Model-injected top-level assertions fail during module import, masking underlying mathematical errors or formula swaps in the core functions.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_MATH.existing_supporting_evidence: All member cells contain 'module_level_executable_assertion' and 'mathematical_error' or 'parameter_semantics_swap'.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_MATH.unresolved_ambiguities: Formulas or floating-point limits are not uniquely restorable without looking at canonical solutions/hidden tests.

MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_FLOW.description: Provisional secondary-error grouping: assertion-masked control flow failures or goal drift.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_FLOW.mechanism_hypothesis: Model-injected top-level assertions fail during module import, masking control flow failures or goal drift under non-numeric input bounds.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_FLOW.existing_supporting_evidence: All member cells contain 'module_level_executable_assertion' and 'control_flow_failure' or 'semantic_goal_drift'.
MECH_FAMILY_ASSERT_MASKED_FLOW.unresolved_ambiguities: Handling loop terminations and exception blocks requires custom control logic design.
